name: 电商爆款文案生成器
examples_zh: 为抖音小店的便携榨汁杯生成 3 个 30 字以内标题、5 条卖点和一段限时秒杀文案
根据这款儿童护脊书包的参数，写淘宝详情页首屏海报文案、痛点场景和信任背书
分析这两个竞品的京东标题，给我的无线洗地机改写更突出吸力和续航的标题
examples_en: Create three product titles under 30 Chinese characters, five selling points, and a flash-sale promo for a portable blender on Douyin Shop
Use the specs of this ergonomic kids schoolbag to write Taobao detail-page hero copy, pain-point scenarios, and trust proof
Analyze these two JD competitor titles and rewrite my cordless floor washer title to emphasize suction power and battery life
